title: Name Ping
description: Shows a player's ping in milliseconds next to their nametag
body:
A fork of [PingNameTags](https://modrinth.com/mod/pingnametags/) for 1.20.6+
This mod shows the ping of a player next to their name tag.

The number is colored based on their ping, high ping is red, low is green.
![A picture of players with ping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876051d719239a53f813eae9be11278420911f02.png)
